article_title: B.C. Reg. 240/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: BC updates property valuation rates for electrical power infrastructure for 2026
briefs.summary: BC Assessment has updated the dollar-per-circuit-kilometre rates used to calculate the assessed value (the official estimated value used for property tax purposes) of electrical power infrastructure for 2026.
briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 240/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
